schemas.name: Student Loan Repayment Calculator
schemas.description: Compare student loan repayment plans including Standard, IBR, SAVE, and PSLF. Calculate your payoff timeline, total interest, and potential forgiveness.

mainEntity.name: What is the best student loan repayment calculator?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best student loan repayment calculator lets you compare multiple strategies side-by-side. You should be able to see the standard 10-year plan, income-driven repayment (IDR) plans like SAVE or IBR, and see the impact of Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) based on your specific income and loan balance.

mainEntity.name: How fast can I pay off student loans?

acceptedAnswer.text: How fast you can pay off student loans depends on your interest rate, balance, and how much extra you pay each month. On a standard plan, it takes 10 years. By making extra payments, you can reduce this timeline to 5 years or less. Using a student loan payoff calculator helps you visualize the exact timeline based on your budget.

mainEntity.name: Should I use an income-based repayment (IBR) plan?

acceptedAnswer.text: An income-based repayment plan is excellent if your debt is high compared to your income. It caps your monthly payment at a percentage of your discretionary income (often 10%). However, it extends your payoff timeline to 20 or 25 years, meaning you might pay more in total interest unless you qualify for PSLF or IDR forgiveness.

mainEntity.name: How does Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) work?

acceptedAnswer.text: PSLF forgives your remaining federal student loan balance after you make 120 qualifying monthly payments while working full-time for an eligible non-profit or government employer. You must be on an income-driven repayment plan to benefit, otherwise, a standard 10-year plan pays off the loan before forgiveness kicks in.

mainEntity.name: What is a student loan payoff calculator?

acceptedAnswer.text: A student loan payoff calculator is a financial tool that projects the future trajectory of your debt. It shows your monthly payments, total interest paid, total amount paid over the life of the loan, and the exact date you will be debt-free under various repayment strategies.

schemas.headline: Student Loan Repayment Calculator: Standard, IBR & PSLF Compared
schemas.description: Compare student loan repayment plans. Calculate your total paid, forgiveness amount, timeline, and extra payment impact.
